title: Plan Nacional de Ciberseguridad (Diciembre 2025) [PDF]
description: Official Plan Nacional de Ciberseguridad 2025-2030 issued by Mexico's Agencia de Transformacion Digital y Telecomunicaciones (ATDT). Image-rendered PDF (Google/Skia producer); references quantum computing (computacion cuantica) only as a generic emerging threat. No explicit post-quantum/quantum-resistant cryptography reference found in available text or secondary coverage.

title: Liderara Mexico ciberresiliencia en la region con Plan Nacional de Ciberseguridad
description: ATDT press announcement of the Plan Nacional de Ciberseguridad 2025-2030. Mentions emerging technologies (AI, quantum computing) generically; no explicit PQC reference.

title: ACUERDO por el que se emite la Politica General de Ciberseguridad para la Administracion Publica Federal (DOF 17 dic 2025) [PDF]
description: Binding cybersecurity policy for Mexico's Federal Public Administration, published in the Diario Oficial de la Federacion on 17 December 2025 by the ATDT. Extracted PDF text contains zero mentions of quantum or post-quantum cryptography.

title: Programa Sectorial de la Agencia de Transformacion Digital y Telecomunicaciones 2025-2030
description: ATDT sectoral programme 2025-2030. Confirmed (via fetch) to contain no mention of quantum computing or post-quantum cryptography.

title: Centro de Ciberseguridad Gubernamental
description: ATDT article on the Government Cybersecurity Centre. General cybersecurity governance; no PQC reference found.

title: Ciberseguridad (agenda)
description: ATDT cybersecurity agenda landing page. Index/listing page; no explicit PQC content found.

title: Guardia Nacional recibe declaracion de cumplimiento del CERT-MX bajo el Modelo SIM3 CSIRTAmericas Baseline
description: Announcement on CERT-MX (Guardia Nacional) attaining SIM3 incident-handling maturity compliance. Concerns CSIRT maturity, not cryptography; no PQC reference.

title: Inicia evaluacion del CERT-MX de la Guardia Nacional, con base al modelo de madurez de gestion de incidentes de seguridad
description: Announcement that CERT-MX began a SIM3 incident-management maturity evaluation. No cryptography or PQC content.

title: Ciberseguridad Ciudadana | Guardia Nacional CERT-MX
description: CERT-MX citizen cybersecurity awareness article. General awareness content; no PQC reference.

title: Post-Quantum Digital Signature for the Mexican Digital Invoices by Internet
